personal.name: Moein Tash

experience.details: Teaching graduate-level courses in Natural Language Processing (NLP).

Built a chatbot with Streamlit, LangChain, and FAISS. Created social support dataset in English and Spanish. Applied deep learning to hate/hope speech and sentiment analysis. Trained/deployed NLP models on Azure ML.
Built ML models for NLP tasks using TensorFlow and Scikit-learn. Performed exploratory data analysis to guide predictive modeling.
Processed and analyzed data using Pandas and NumPy. Automated data pipelines for retrieval and cleaning.

projects.title: URL-Based Chatbot with RAG
projects.description: Built a conversational AI chatbot that ingests content from URLs and answers user queries using retrieval-augmented generation. Deployed via Streamlit.

projects.title: Social Support Dataset (EN & ES)
projects.description: Created a bilingual social support detection dataset in English and Spanish from social media, used for training and benchmarking NLP models.

projects.title: Crypto Emotion Analysis System
projects.description: Analyzed sentiment and psycholinguistic features of cryptocurrency discourse on X (Twitter), correlating emotional trends with market price movements.

projects.title: IberLEF 2026 SSD Shared Task
projects.description: Organizing the Social Support Detection Shared Task at IberLEF 2026 — including task design, dataset curation, evaluation framework, and coordination.

chatbotKnowledge.answer: Moein's research focuses on Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Social Media Mining. He works on social support detection, hate/hope speech detection, sentiment analysis, language identification, and FinTech NLP — particularly cryptocurrency discourse analysis.

Moein Shahiki Tash is a PhD researcher in Artificial Intelligence (NLP) at IPN Mexico City, working at the Gelbukh Lab. He's also a Lecturer at Universidad Panamericana, where he teaches graduate-level NLP courses.
You can reach Moein at moein.tash@gmail.com or connect via LinkedIn and Google Scholar.

greetings: Hello! I'm Moein's AI assistant. Feel free to ask me anything about Moein Tash.
offTopicResponse: I can only answer questions related to Moein Tash. Please ask something about his background, experience, skills, or research.
